# Security policy

Do not open a public issue for a suspected vulnerability or exposed credential.

Report security issues to `security@lemonize.cyou`. Include the affected URL or package, impact, and minimal reproduction details. Do not include active access tokens, private keys, or personal data. The operator will acknowledge valid reports as soon as practical for this noncommercial beta.

Malicious or rights-infringing packages should be reported to `abuse@lemonize.cyou`.

Only the latest deployed Lemonize web, registry, scanner, npm proxy, and CLI versions are supported. Package contents are third-party code and are not covered by this policy.
